name: Bryce Tiles
short_description: A Manhattan/taxicab-geometric tile-based isometric-sokoban puzzle game featuring everyone's favorite 90's anti-hero, Bryce! You'll push boxes across tiles, sands, still waters, rapids, moving floors, ice and coals to move into position! Don't forget to redirect the lasers and evade those enemies!
detailed_description:
Theme song sung by Marnée Richardson, written/produced by Elvisish.

Bryce Tiles: The Isometric Push-Puzzler! Check it:

• Think Rescue Rover, Bolo Adventures, Puzzle Pits, Adventures of Lolo and Capt'n Squiddy's Bootleg Push-Push!

• 100 main campaign levels, 30 additional mission levels plus secret world levels and endings!

• Cute, anti-heroic protagonist with an adorably utilitarian personality!

• Original ambient virtual-analog synthesizer soundtrack!

• Super slick gameplay on Windows! Modern graphical slickness and smooth 165fps+ motion!

• Occasional pop culture references to nineties gaming and music!

• Dozens of Sokoban-style mechanics and gameplay designs!

• 10+ unique enemies lurking throughout the game! 

• Occasional novelty level structures! Pathfinding enemies! Environmental effects!

• Localization support for 12 languages!

• Full level-editor, campaign maker and Steam™ Workshop® uploader included!

• Secret worlds, hidden gameplay modes, final bosses and alternative endings!

Ever wanted to push, push, push your way to success? Feelin' a little desperate to glide into position? Movin', groovin' and cruisin' through an isometric tile-space of colorful, pre-rendered visuals and cool-toon characters? Look no further, Bryce Tiles is here!

Be prepared for a box-pushing time! Bryce Tiles is a post- MSDOSWare game set in the early 00's! Bryce has discovered a new time portal in his Klik 'N' Complete Box and has used it once more to return to 25 years ago, when EuroMaxi K&C was shared by Nash!

In an entirely isometric Meiersian world, he pushes, slides, swims, flees, rolls and collects the missing instruments around more than 130 levels of nostalgic sokoban action.

Just take your little man and push him around... seriously, it's never been easier!

Up, down, left, right, hit all those hard-to-reach spots (not diagonally though!) and make it out of the level as fast as you can... or in as few amount as pushes!

You'll encounter sinking sands, still (but deep!) waters, dangerously fast rapids, moving floors, slidey ice and burning hot coals as you push those boxes around!

Plan ahead and determine which pushable object is most suitable for the environment!

Rolling balls (hint: they don't stop by themselves!), Scrump The Ruff™, laser beams (with mirrors to reflect them... yes, we know where you saw them first!)...

...locked doors, push-pads, it's all there to try and confuse you... but you'll stay one step ahead!

Plenty of tricks and traps to keep you busy, challenging puzzle designs and beautifully pre-rendered surroundings to keep you entertained for hours!

There's only one Bryce Tiles! ↓↓↓

(Theme song sung by Marnée Richardson and written and produced by Elvisish. NOT A.I.



Absolutely no AI was used in the creation of Bryce Tiles, its theme/game music, art or any other part of the game.)

supported_languages: English, French, Italian, German, Spanish - Spain, Japanese, Korean, Polish, Portuguese - Brazil, Russian, Simplified Chinese, Traditional Chinese, Turkish, Ukrainian
